content.problemStatement:
You are given NNN points in DDD-dimensional space. The ithi^{th}ith point has DDD coordinates - xi,1,xi,2,‚Ä¶,xi,Dx_{i, 1}, x_{i, 2}, \ldots, x_{i, D}xi,1‚Äč,xi,2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,xi,D‚Äč.

Consider a weighted undirected complete graph with these NNN points as its vertices. Weight of the edge between points iii and jjj is ‚ą£xi,1‚ąíxj,1‚ą£+‚ą£xi,2‚ąíxj,2‚ą£+‚Ä¶+‚ą£xi,D‚ąíxj,D‚ą£|x_{i,1} - x_{j, 1}| + |x_{i,2} - x_{j, 2}| + \ldots + |x_{i, D} - x_{j,D}|‚ą£xi,1‚Äč‚ąíxj,1‚Äč‚ą£+‚ą£xi,2‚Äč‚ąíxj,2‚Äč‚ą£+‚Ä¶+‚ą£xi,D‚Äč‚ąíxj,D‚Äč‚ą£.

Find the weight of the maximum spanning tree of this graph.

###Input:


The first line contains two integers N,DN, DN,D.
The iii-th of the next NNN lines contains a description of the iii-th point. It has DDD integers: xi,1,xi,2,‚Ä¶,xi,Dx_{i, 1}, x_{i, 2}, \ldots, x_{i,D}xi,1‚Äč,xi,2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,xi,D‚Äč.
###Output:
Output a single line which contains a single integer - the Maximum Spanning Tree Weight

###Constraints


1‚Č§D‚Č§51 \leq D \leq 51‚Č§D‚Č§5
1‚Č§N‚Č§200‚ÄČ0001 \leq N \leq 200\,0001‚Č§N‚Č§200000
0‚Č§xi,j‚Č§100‚ÄČ0000 \leq x_{i, j} \leq 100\,0000‚Č§xi,j‚Äč‚Č§100000
